stage: Stage42-AP proposed source-level residual context retraining
current_facts: 当前不是 true 3D world model。
当前不是 large-scale foundation world model。
当前仍是 protected dataset-local / raw-frame 2.5D 多智能体 world-state candidate。
Stage42-AP 是 proposed source-level split residual-context retraining，不是 metric 或 seconds-level 结果。
第一阶段只用 baseline-family rollout context 训练；第二阶段只让 context features 预测第一阶段剩余误差。
所有 residual alpha / lambda / safety policy 均在 validation 上选择；test 只评一次。
future waypoints / endpoints 只作为 supervised labels 或 evaluation labels，不作为 inference input。
不使用 central velocity，不使用 test endpoints 构建 goals，不使用 test metrics 调 threshold。

residual_history.interpretation: residual_history does not improve over the baseline-family-only first-stage model by > 0.01; residual context contribution not proven here.

residual_goal.interpretation: residual_goal does not improve over the baseline-family-only first-stage model by > 0.01; residual context contribution not proven here.

residual_neighbor.interpretation: residual_neighbor does not improve over the baseline-family-only first-stage model by > 0.01; residual context contribution not proven here.

residual_history_goal.interpretation: residual_history_goal does not improve over the baseline-family-only first-stage model by > 0.01; residual context contribution not proven here.

residual_history_neighbor.interpretation: residual_history_neighbor does not improve over the baseline-family-only first-stage model by > 0.01; residual context contribution not proven here.

residual_goal_neighbor.interpretation: residual_goal_neighbor does not improve over the baseline-family-only first-stage model by > 0.01; residual context contribution not proven here.

residual_history_goal_neighbor.interpretation: residual_history_goal_neighbor does not improve over the baseline-family-only first-stage model by > 0.01; residual context contribution not proven here.

summary.interpretation: Residual-context variants test whether history/goal/neighbor explain errors left by baseline-family rollout context. Positive variants support context contribution beyond baseline family; negative variants mean current context features do not add residual value under this ridge protocol.
